intro: New York State ITS is committed to ensuring that GovArc Support is accessible to everyone, including people with disabilities. We continually work to meet and exceed applicable accessibility standards.

commitment.title: Our Commitment
commitment.body: We believe every resident deserves equal access to state services. GovArc Support is designed and tested to be perceivable, operable, understandable, and robust for all users, regardless of ability or the technology they use.

items.title: Keyboard navigation
items.text: Every interactive element is reachable and operable using only a keyboard, with a visible focus indicator.

items.title: Screen reader support
items.text: Semantic structure, landmarks, and ARIA are used so assistive technology can announce content accurately.

items.title: Readable contrast
items.text: Text and interface colors meet WCAG contrast ratios for legibility.

items.title: Resizable content
items.text: Pages remain usable at 200% zoom and reflow cleanly on small screens.

items.title: Reduced motion
items.text: Animations respect your operating-system preference for reduced motion.

items.title: Clear language
items.text: Plain-language content and consistent navigation make tasks easy to complete.

standards.title: Standards We Follow
items: Web Content Accessibility Guidelines (WCAG) 2.2, Level AA
New York State accessibility policy NYS-P08-005

testing.title: How We Test
items: Automated testing with axe-core and Lighthouse on every page
Screen reader spot-checks with NVDA, JAWS, and VoiceOver

report.title: Report an Accessibility Issue
report.body: If you encounter an accessibility barrier on GovArc Support, please let us know so we can fix it.
report.response: We respond to accessibility reports within two business days.
